items.title: Spectator Crowd Prediction
items.description: Spectators watching via NarratorBus SSE submit a live prediction (intercept / delivery-completes). A crowd consensus bar updates in real time in the overlay. Top-correct predictors earn cosmetic commendations. No monetisation — pure engagement.
items.recipe: Add a POST /api/vaultfront/narrator/:gameId/predict endpoint (body: {outcome:'intercept'|'delivery', persistentId}). Store predictions in a per-game in-memory map. Broadcast updated tally as SSE event type='crowd_vote'. In StreamOverlayPage, render a thin progress bar showing intercept% vs delivery%. Reset on next convoy launch event.

items.title: Vault Intelligence Market
items.description: Before launching a convoy, a player can spend gold to purchase route-risk intelligence from allies who have scouted that corridor. Creates an in-match information economy — knowing danger zones is worth real gold. Nobody in the RTS genre has a real-time intelligence market.
items.recipe: Add a VaultIntelCommand ('purchase_route_intel') processed in VaultFrontExecution: deduct gold from buyer, credit 10% to seller, return the routeRisk + interceptProbability for the requested corridor as an activity event visible only to the buyer. Add 'buy_intel' to VaultFrontLayer as a temporary route-risk tooltip overlay. Expose via POST /api/vaultfront/intel-purchase (schema: buyerPersistentId, sellerId, tileRef).

items.title: Event-Triggered Coach Hints
items.description: CoachHintEngine fires exactly once per game (hasFetched=true after first call). Players who get flanked, lose a convoy, or have a bounty placed on them receive zero guidance. Event-triggered hints at key moments triple coaching relevance.
items.recipe: Remove the hasFetched guard; replace with per-trigger cooldowns. Add four trigger types: (1) convoy_lost → 'Your convoy was intercepted — launch a ghost route next time'; (2) bounty_placed_on_player → context-aware counter-play hint; (3) last_stand_activated_nearby → tactical repositioning hint; (4) chain_broken → combo recovery hint. Each trigger has its own 5-min cooldown tracked in a Map<string, number>. Pass trigger type + context to fetchMicroHint() as an additional param.

items.title: Emerging Play-Style Indicator (Mid-Match)
items.description: Play-style insight card (Iron Fist / Convoy Lord / Shadow Broker) already appears post-game in WinModal. Showing the player their emerging style mid-match (after 60 ticks) lets them adapt their strategy — and creates a coaching moment before outcomes are locked.
items.recipe: In WinModal.computePlayStyle(), extract the scoring logic into a shared PlayStyleClassifier util. In VaultFrontLayer.tick(), after 60 ticks, compute PlayStyleClassifier with current activity counts and render a small sidebar chip ('Emerging: Convoy Lord ⚡') in GameRightSidebar. Chip updates every 120 ticks. No API call — pure client-side from local activity events.

items.title: Animated Elo Delta in WinModal
items.description: WinModal shows new rank label (RankBadge) but no animated Elo delta. The moment of seeing points gained or lost is one of the most emotionally potent frames in a competitive game — currently it's silent. A satisfying counter animation and tier-up flash closes the loop.
items.recipe: Add eloOld and eloNew props to WinModal's post-game data fetch. Render a counter that animates from eloOld → eloNew over 1.5s using requestAnimationFrame. Color green (gain) / red (loss). Show delta badge (+32, -18) next to the counter. If eloNew crosses a tier boundary, fire a full-screen shimmer flash (CSS keyframe on the tier label) and a distinct sound cue. Data source: extend GET /api/vaultfront/outcome/summary to include previousElo and currentElo per persistentId.

items.title: Daily Challenge System
items.description: No daily objective system exists. Daily challenges with bonus gold/XP rewards are the single highest-ROI retention lever for competitive games — they give players a reason to open the game every day even if they can only play one match.
items.recipe: Add a DailyChallengeStore (in-memory + DB row): generate a new challenge each UTC midnight using a seeded selection from a preset pool (intercept 3 convoys / control 5 vault sites / complete a ghost route / trigger a last-stand). Expose GET /api/vaultfront/daily-challenge (returns {challengeId, description, progress, target, reward}). Wire progress updates into VaultFrontExecution via existing activity events. Render a compact daily-challenge card in GameRightSidebar (persistent, not a banner). Award bonus gold on completion via VaultFrontExecution.

items.title: Spectator-Selectable Narrator Persona
items.description: NarratorBus generates commentary with a single fixed voice. Letting spectators choose HYPE / TACTICAL / COMEDIC persona turns passive watching into an expressive experience — nobody in RTS streaming offers per-viewer commentary style. Token-cost neutral (just system prompt variant, same Haiku model).
items.recipe: Add a persona query param to GET /api/vaultfront/narrator/:gameId?persona=hype|tactical|comedic. In NarratorBus.subscribe(), store the persona on the client state. In flush(), select a system prompt variant keyed by persona (all three fit within one cached system prompt block using conditional sections). Broadcast persona-specific commentary only to clients of that persona. Default persona = hype.

items.title: Rank Decay Indicator for Inactive Players
items.description: Players who don't play for 7+ days see their rank badge marked 'Decaying' in the leaderboard and profile. Creates daily retention pressure without punishing casual players (it's a visual indicator, not a stat change).
items.recipe: In PlayerStatsStore, add lastMatchAt timestamp. In GET /api/leaderboard and GET /api/vaultfront/contracts, compute isDecaying = (now - lastMatchAt) > 7 days. In RankBadge, render a pulsing orange border + 'Decaying' tooltip when decaying=true. Add a 'Play to stop decay' CTA in GameStartingModal for returning players.

items.title: In-Match Mutator Vote Banner (Last 5 Minutes)
items.description: The community mutator vote happens on Discord but players in-match are unaware of standings. Surfacing live vote standings during the final 5 minutes of a match creates a social connection between the match and the community, driving Discord engagement.
items.recipe: In VaultSeasonScheduler.getStatus(), include voteStandings (top-3 candidates + vote counts). In VaultFrontLayer.tick(), when ticks > totalTicks - 300 (≈5 min at 10tps), fetch /api/season/current once and render a compact vote-standings mini-card in GameRightSidebar for 30 seconds. Add a 'Vote on Discord' link in the card.

items.title: Dynasty Story in WinModal
items.description: The dynasty story AI endpoint (/api/vaultfront/dynasty-story/:clanId) exists and generates a 300-word clan legend, but WinModal only shows the play-style card. Clan players completing a match deserve to see their clan's narrative evolve — this closes a dangling feature loop.
items.recipe: In WinModal's post-game fetch chain, if player has a clanId, call fetchDynastyStory(clanId). Render below the play-style card as a 'Clan Legacy' section with a typewriter animation (10ms per char). Add a 'Share to Discord' copy-to-clipboard button that formats: '[ClanName] — [first sentence of dynasty story] #VaultFront'.

items.title: Elo History Sparkline on RankBadge
items.description: RankBadge shows current rank label but no trend. A 10-match sparkline on hover communicates 'climbing' vs 'dropping' at a glance — critical for re-engagement and for players assessing matchmaking fairness.
items.recipe: Extend PlayerStatsStore to store the last 10 eloHistory entries as a JSON column. Add eloHistory to GET /api/vaultfront/contracts response. In RankBadge, add a @state() history prop and render an SVG sparkline (10 points, 60×18px) on :hover / :focus. Color: green if last point > first point, red otherwise. Add a 'Climbing ▲' / 'Dropping ▼' text label next to the sparkline.

items.title: Contextual Match State in NarratorBus
items.description: NarratorBus generates commentary with zero game context — it receives only an activityLabel string and produces generic one-liners. Wiring in match phase (early/mid/late), site control balance, and the current leader identity transforms commentary from generic to specific and immersive.
items.recipe: Add a NarratorContextSnapshot interface {tickBucket: 'early'|'mid'|'late', leadingPlayer: string, siteBalance: string, mutator: string}. In Worker.ts, when queueEvent() is called, also pass the latest context snapshot (cheap to derive from existing in-memory state). In NarratorBus.flush(), inject context into the user message: 'Match phase: mid. Leader: PlayerX controls 4/8 sites. Events: intercept, convoy_launched.' System prompt stays cached.

items.title: Shareable Post-Match Image Card
items.description: After WinModal, players have no artifact to share. A canvas-generated image card with match outcome, rank delta, top stat, and a QR linking to the replay gives VaultFront organic social reach without any backend infrastructure.
items.recipe: In WinModal, after Elo animation completes, render a 'Share Result' button. On click, use OffscreenCanvas to draw: VaultFront logo (top-left), outcome banner (WIN/LOSS in tier color), rank delta (+32 Elo → Gold), top stat (e.g., '3 convoys intercepted'), and a QR code (qrcode.js) encoding the replay URL. Convert to PNG blob and trigger download or navigator.clipboard.write(). No server call required.

items.title: AI-Powered Replay Highlight Detection
items.description: ReplayHighlightStore exists but highlight selection is manual. Using the existing activity event log, AI can score each 30s window by excitement density (intercepts + last-stand + heist events) and auto-select the best clip — zero API cost, pure scoring heuristic.
items.recipe: In ReplayHighlightStore.getOrCreate(), score each 30s tick window by summing event weights: intercept=10, last_stand=8, heist=7, bounty_collected=5, surge_entry=4. Pick the window with the highest score as the auto-highlight startTick. Add autoHighlightTick to the manifest returned by GET /api/replay/:gameId/highlight. In ReplayPanel, if autoHighlightTick exists, add a '⚡ Best Moment' button that seeks to that tick.

items.title: VaultFrontLayer Overlay Priority Queue
items.description: VaultFrontLayer renders 7+ simultaneous overlay types (surge, lastStand, heist, bounty, warchest, worldEvent, comboBanner) with no coordination. When multiple events fire simultaneously — common in late-game — they visually conflict and degrade readability.
items.recipe: Define an OverlaySlot enum with priority ranks (LAST_STAND=1 highest, then HEIST, SURGE, BOUNTY, WARCHEST, WORLD_EVENT, COMBO, MUTATOR). In VaultFrontLayer.tick(), compute the highest-priority active overlay and render only that in the primary slot. Queue lower-priority overlays for display after the primary expires. Track queue in activeOverlayQueue: Array<{type, expiresAtTick}> sorted by priority.

items.title: Oracle/Prophecy In-Memory Response Cache
items.description: Every player hitting game start generates a separate Haiku call to /api/vaultfront/match-oracle and /api/vaultfront/match-prophecy. For the same mapName + playerCount tier, oracle predictions and prophecy text are identical within a ~5-minute window. Caching them eliminates redundant spend.
items.recipe: Add a Map<string, {data: object, expiresAt: number}> LRU cache (max 50 entries, 5-min TTL) in Worker.ts. Cache key = `${mapName}:${playerCountBucket}`. For oracle: check cache before Anthropic call; on miss, generate and store. For prophecy: same pattern. Measurement: add a cache-hit counter to GET /api/admin/anti-cheat/flagged debug response for operator visibility.

items.title: Fix Master.ts(166,30) Build Blocker
items.description: The pre-existing type error at src/server/Master.ts(166,30) blocks npm run build-prod and prevents production deployments. Every session notes it as a known residual. This must be cleared.
items.recipe: Read Master.ts line 166. Identify the unsafe type widening (likely a missing type cast or incorrect argument type). Apply the minimal correct fix. Run tsc --noEmit to verify clean compile. Run npm run build-prod to confirm the build completes.

items.title: Fix Global Lint Failures
items.description: npm run lint fails on unrelated e2e/project-service config and Studio script issues. This masks new lint regressions and breaks CI signal.
items.recipe: Run npm run lint, identify the failing rules. For e2e config issues, add targeted eslint ignores or fix the offending files. For Studio script issues, add them to .eslintignore or fix imports. Run npm run lint again to confirm clean pass.

executionLog.coach-hint-site-signal: ✅ CoachHintEngine tracks VaultFrontStatus, counts local vault sites, avoids stale proxy; regression test added.
executionLog.stream-overlay-reconnect-memory: ✅ StreamingBus keeps bounded recent-event buffer, replays to reconnecting overlays, unrefs timers.
executionLog.narrator-bus-token-guardrails: ✅ NarratorBus lazy-loads Anthropic, deduplicates labels, caps pending events, sanitizes commentary, replays last call to late subscribers.
executionLog.anti-cheat-alert-cooldown: ✅ AntiCheatMonitor applies alert cooldown, bounds retained game IDs, exposes test/debug state.
executionLog.master-ts-build-fix: ✅ Master.ts:166 cast to NodeJS.Signals fixed; tsc --noEmit and npm run build-prod both clean.
executionLog.global-lint-unblock: ✅ e2e/ added to eslint ignores; script rule overrides for no-empty/no-useless-escape added.
executionLog.narrator-sentiment-persona: ✅ NarratorBus rewritten with HYPE/TACTICAL/COMEDIC persona system; per-persona SSE broadcast; context snapshot injection.
executionLog.narrator-match-context: ✅ NarratorContextSnapshot interface added; Worker.ts passes tickBucket/leadingPlayer/siteBalance/mutator; NarratorBus injects into user message.
executionLog.coach-hint-event-triggers: ✅ CoachHintEngine rewritten with 5 trigger types + per-trigger cooldowns; convoy_lost/bounty_placed/last_stand_nearby/chain_broken/idle.
executionLog.play-style-mid-match: ✅ PlayStyleClassifier extracted from WinModal; PlayStyleChip Lit component added to GameRenderer layers; updates every 120 ticks.
executionLog.mutator-live-vote-banner: ✅ VaultSeasonScheduler.getStatus() returns voteStandings top-3; VaultFrontLayer fetches at tick 3000, draws vote banner for 30 ticks.
executionLog.elo-winmodal-animation: ✅ fetchVaultFrontContracts() in Api.ts; WinModal fetches Elo 3s post-show, animates counter via rAF, stores in localStorage.
executionLog.dynasty-story-winmodal: ✅ WinModal fetches clan dynasty story from getUserMe clanId, typewriter animation, Share button copies first sentence.
executionLog.post-match-share-card: ✅ WinModal _handleShareCard() uses OffscreenCanvas to render WIN/LOSS result card (outcome, Elo delta, top stat, brand) and triggers download.
executionLog.seasonal-rank-decay: ✅ RankBadge gains decaying prop with pulsing orange outline + ↓ badge; Worker.ts contracts endpoint sets isDecaying.
executionLog.elo-rank-sparkline: ✅ PlayerStatsStore.getEloHistory() added; contracts endpoint returns eloHistory; RankBadge renders SVG sparkline on hover with Climbing▲/Dropping▼ label.
executionLog.spectator-crowd-prediction: ✅ POST /predict endpoint with in-memory tally; NarratorBus.broadcastRaw() added; StreamOverlayPage renders crowd_vote bar.
executionLog.replay-ai-highlight: ✅ ReplayHighlightStore weights updated (intercept=10, last_stand=8, heist=7); autoHighlightTick added; ReplayPanel shows ⚡ Best Moment link.
executionLog.daily-challenge-system: ✅ DailyChallengeStore seeded daily pool; GET /daily-challenge endpoint; NarratorEventSchema extended with persistentId for tracking; GameRightSidebar shows compact daily card.
executionLog.vault-intelligence-market: ✅ POST /intel-purchase and /intel-list endpoints added; VaultFrontLayer.showIntelTooltip() + drawIntelTooltip() canvas overlay renders route risk.
executionLog.token-oracle-cache: ✅ aiResponseCache Map (50-entry LRU, 5-min TTL); oracle and prophecy endpoints check cache before Anthropic call; cache-hit returns cached:true.
